# Chimera default app/window icons

Generated, committed icon set for the Chimera engine (F67 — App Icon & Per-Game Branding).

**Do not edit these files by hand.** They are derived deterministically from the Chimera
logo and regenerated by [`tools/generate-icons.ts`](../../../tools/generate-icons.ts).

## Regenerate

```
pnpm icons:generate
```

Source: `docs/assets/chimera-logo-compact.png` (override with `--source <png>`).
Output: this directory (override with `--out <dir>`).

## Contents

| File                 | Purpose                                                                                                                           |
| -------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `chimera.png`        | **Dev-runtime default** (512×512) — resolved by `createMainWindow` when a game declares no `GameManifest.icon` override (F67 T2). |
| `chimera.icns`       | macOS packaging icon (F67 T4).                                                                                                    |
| `chimera.ico`        | Windows packaging icon (F67 T4).                                                                                                  |
| `chimera-<size>.png` | Loose square PNGs (16–1024) for Linux packaging and explicit-size consumers.                                                      |

The set ships with the published `@chimera-engine/electron` package (see the `files`
field in [`electron/package.json`](../../package.json)).
